{{Infobox character
| name = Green Knight
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Titan Knight]], [[Green Knight]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Pilot|pilot]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Parryl]], known as the [[Green]] [[Knight]], is a [[Lichborn]] girl who serves as the youngest member of the [[Titan Knights]]. She possesses [[emerald]]-glowing eyes and is noted for her energetic and cheerful personality. [[Parryl]] was selected for her role at an early age due to her connection as the niece of [[Doctor Cryce]], though she also possesses genuine innate ability. Her duties have included piloting a starship in a support capacity while her [[Divine Titan]] was being repaired. The [[Green Divine Titan]] itself is characterized by pristine armor and eyes that emit radiant [[emerald]] energy, functioning as a mobile armory equipped with multiple weapons.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Green]] [[Knight]] was a [[Titan Knight]] who once engaged in combat with [[Raion]]. During a period when her [[Divine Titan]] required repairs, she fulfilled a support role by piloting a starship. Her [[Divine Titan]] eventually fell from [[Subspace]], an occurrence that preceded her death, which became a massive galactic event. While she possessed the potential to pose a direct threat to Eshkinaar, her title was eventually held by [[Parryl]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Green Knight]] is a character [[Raion]] fought.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Green Knight]] is a [[Titan Knight]] who pilots a starship in a support role while her [[Divine Titan]] undergoes repairs.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Green Knight]] is a character whose [[Divine Titan]] falls from [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The death of the [[Green Knight]] was a galactic event.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Green Knight]] could have threatened Esh�kinaar directly.}}
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Parryl]] is the former [[Green Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Green Knight]] is [[Doctor Janbell Cryce]]'s niece.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
